backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the US Repeater Network backend, defining repeater/user types, geographic zip code coordinates, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization. Implements CRUD operations, favorites, proximity search, and admin approval workflows for repeater submissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering RepeaterBook API integration, directory page updates, and detail modal compatibility.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose, covering services, hooks, pages, components, and styling files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, cards, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'US Repeater Network' and mounting the app via a root div and module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, directory, submit, admin, favorites, profile), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a shared RootLayout with Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AdminPassphraseG: Passphrase-protected gate component for the admin dashboard that validates the hardcoded passphrase 'WendellAdmin2024' and calls an onAuthenticated callback on success, with show/hide toggle and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/ApprovedRepeater: Admin component that displays a list of approved repeaters with their details and provides a delete action with confirmation dialog for each entry.
frontend/src/components/FavoriteButton.t: A toggle button component that allows authenticated users to add or remove a repeater from their favorites, with tooltip support for disabled states.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: A filter UI component supporting two search modes—browse by state/city or search by zip code with radius—used to filter the repeater directory.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying branding, quick navigation links, data source credits, and a copyright notice with a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/PendingRepeaters: Admin component that lists pending repeater submissions as cards, each with approve and reject action buttons that call the backend moderation API.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time users to set up their profile with a display name, optional call sign, and bio, saving via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RepeaterCard.tsx: A clickable card component that displays summary info (call sign, frequency, location, tone, offset, status) for both local and RepeaterBook repeater entries, with source-specific badges.
frontend/src/components/RepeaterDetailMo: A detailed modal dialog showing all fields of a selected repeater (local or RepeaterBook), including frequency, offset, tones, coverage, notes, and a favorite button.
frontend/src/components/RepeaterForm.tsx: A form component for submitting a new repeater with fields for frequency, offset, call sign, location, tone settings, and status, including client-side validation before calling the provided `onSubmit` handler.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, repeater listing/searching/filtering, and admin operations (approve, delete, favorites).
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Orbitron/Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a navy/amber dark-theme design system via CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page gated by a passphrase component that displays pending and approved repeater counts in tabs, delegating list management to PendingRepeatersList and ApprovedRepeatersAdmin components.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Legacy admin page with its own passphrase gate that lists pending repeaters and allows approving or deleting them via inline action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/DirectoryPage.tsx: Repeater directory page that merges local backend repeaters with RepeaterBook API results, supporting filtering by state, city, frequency, and call sign with a detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/FavoritesPage.tsx: Favorites page that shows a logged-in user's saved local repeaters fetched via useGetFavorites, with a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the US Repeater Network site featuring a hero section, feature highlights grid, and call-to-action buttons linking to the directory and repeater submission pages.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page that allows authenticated users to view and save their display name, call sign, and bio, with a login prompt shown to unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitPage.tsx: Form page for submitting a new GMRS/ham radio repeater to the directory, requiring authentication and collecting frequency, location, tone, and operational details before sending to the backend for admin review.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitRepeaterPage.ts: Alternative repeater submission page using a shared RepeaterForm component, with login-required gating and a success confirmation state after submission.
frontend/src/services/repeaterBookApi.ts: Service module that defines TypeScript interfaces and helper functions for fetching, parsing, and mapping live repeater data from the RepeaterBook.com API, including state FIPS code lookup and tone/mode/link info builders.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom ham-radio-themed colors, fonts (Inter, Orbitron, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the US Repeater Network ham radio directory app, including its features, architecture (Internet Identity auth, RepeaterBook API, hardcoded admin passphrase), and versioning metadata.
